svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="onion-architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-554" dy="-186" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="磁缆跟踪系统分层架构（洋葱模型）与每帧闭环数据流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="760" x="30" y="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#999999;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="20" y="70" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="20" y="630" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1f3a5f;" value="可视化 / 编排层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="104" width="740" x="30" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="主循环编排
（main_viz）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="30" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="实时多面板可视化
（visualization）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="265" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="传感器源 / 感知驱动
（SensorSource·driver）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="500" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#274d20;" value="控制决策层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="104" width="740" x="30" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="20" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;" value="任务状态机
（mission_manager）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="30" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" parent="20" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;" value="ZigZag 运动控制器
（controller）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="265" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" parent="20" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;" value="探测爆发子状态机
（probe_burst_manager）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="500" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6b5610;" value="感知融合层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="104" width="740" x="30" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="30" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="磁感知编排
（MagneticCablePerception）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="20" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" parent="30" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="滤波·峰值·磁矢量
（filters·peaks·vector）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="200" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="33" parent="30" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="中心线拟合·局部路径
（fitter·local_path）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="380" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="34" parent="30" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="横偏·埋深·重捕·置信度
（cross_track·…）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="560" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="40" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#444444;" value="环境与物理层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="104" width="740" x="30" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=13;" value="电缆环境·磁场正演
（environment）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="30" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="42" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=13;" value="几何·投影·拟合工具
（math_utils）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="265" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="43" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=13;" value="路线先验 / 走廊
（routes）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="500" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="50" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#4a2f57;" value="传感器模拟层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="104" width="740" x="30" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="51" parent="50" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="磁力计
（magnetometer）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="20" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="52" parent="50" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="惯导 / IMU
（navigation·IMU）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="200" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="53" parent="50" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="声呐
（sonar）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="380" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="54" parent="50" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="埋深观测
（burial depth）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="560" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="90" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="每帧闭环（约 20 Hz）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="180" x="810" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="100" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="① 传感器采样 poll" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="810" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="② 信号特征 signal_driver" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="810" y="176" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="102" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="③ 感知更新 perception" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="810" y="282" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="103" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="④ 任务决策 mission" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="810" y="388" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="104" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="⑤ 控制指令 controller" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="810" y="494" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="105" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=12;" value="⑥ 载体推进 backend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="810" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="110" edge="1" parent="1" source="100" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="101" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="111" edge="1" parent="1" source="101" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="102" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="112" edge="1" parent="1" source="102" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="103" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="113" edge="1" parent="1" source="103" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="104" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="114" edge="1" parent="1" source="104" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="105" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="115" edge="1" parent="1" source="105" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#b85450;dashed=1;fontColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" target="100" value="反馈"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1040" y="623" /> <mxPoint x="1040" y="93" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
